title: Giants now have AI
description: Giants have long been cut from minecraft, but they can still be summoned by commands. For some reason, the developers also removed the giant's AI. But this datapack fixes it, now the giant can walk, chase players and villagers, attack and infect villagers.
body:
# Description
Giants have long been cut from minecraft, but they can still be summoned by commands. For some reason, the developers also removed the giant's AI. But this datapack fixes it, now the giant can walk, chase players and villagers, attack and infect villagers. (This datapack does not add natural spawn of giants)
